rules.description: Critical personal data of Indian citizens must be stored and processed within the territory of India. Data transfers to non-notified countries are restricted.
rules.section: Sec. 16 - Transfer of Personal Data Outside India
rules.fix_guidance: Use ap-south-1 (Mumbai) for AWS. Use Central India region for Azure. Implement data residency controls for Indian user data.

rules.description: Personal data must only be processed for the specific, lawful purpose for which consent was obtained. No secondary use without fresh consent.
rules.fix_guidance: Document the purpose for each data processing activity. Do not reuse personal data for analytics, marketing, or third-party sharing without separate explicit consent.

rules.description: Must provide a mechanism (Consent Manager) for data principals to give, manage, review, and withdraw consent. Consent must be free, specific, informed, and unambiguous.
rules.fix_guidance: Implement a consent management UI. Record consent with timestamp, purpose, and scope. Provide one-click consent withdrawal.

rules.description: Must notify the Data Protection Board of India and affected data principals of any personal data breach without delay.
rules.fix_guidance: Implement breach detection logging. Set up automated notification system. Create incident response procedures.

rules.description: Data principals have the right to correct inaccurate data and request erasure of personal data that is no longer necessary.
rules.fix_guidance: Implement PUT /user/:id for corrections and DELETE /user/:id for erasure. Add data retention policies with automatic purging.

rules.rule: No PII in logs or monitoring
rules.description: Personal data must not be logged, printed, or exposed in monitoring dashboards, error messages, or debug output.
rules.fix_guidance: Sanitize all log outputs. Use structured logging with PII redaction. Never log Aadhaar numbers, PAN numbers, or phone numbers.

rules.description: Processing personal data of children (under 18) requires verifiable parental consent. No behavioral tracking or targeted advertising for children.
rules.fix_guidance: Implement age verification. Obtain verifiable parental consent for minors. Disable tracking/advertising for users under 18.
